_comment: contract-desk reviews an inbound brand contract. Legal information only, never legal advice. Gated behind the contract_management flag. Every output carries the RESEARCH NOTES boundary, human_review_required, and passes govern-artifact. Reuses usage-rights-check and exclusivity-check as the extraction/conflict core.
description: Contract review: triage, clause-by-clause review with dual severity, legal-requirement checks with cited sources, and a decision-ready escalation brief.

steps.condition: action is review or full, and triage is not a clear walk-away RED; requires contract_redline
action is legal_check or full; requires legal_requirement_checks
action is escalate or full, and any flags or RED/YELLOW items exist

note: Master gate: contract_management. Intake reuses the uploaded_file / google_drive document connectors (no new connector). contract-draft (Phase 2), amendment-trace (Phase 2), and obligation-extract (Phase 3) are not composed here yet; drafting/obligation requests degrade honestly per creator-os-config.json. This spoke never signs or sends; escalation-brief is draft-only.
